summary.en: Zambia does not operate a single dedicated EMC directive in the way the EU does; EMC expectations are carried through ZS standards that adopt the relevant IEC/CISPR emission and immunity references and are applied within ZABS conformity assessment, with radio-related EMC handled by ZICTA for products with wireless functions. Motor-driven tools, electronic speed controllers, chargers, and power supplies should not generate excessive electromagnetic disturbance and should show adequate immunity, evidenced against the applicable ZS/IEC/CISPR references.
summary.zh: 赞比亚不像欧盟那样设有单一专门的 EMC 指令；EMC 要求通过采用相关 IEC/CISPR 发射与抗扰参考的 ZS 标准体现，并在 ZABS 合格评定中适用，带无线功能产品的无线电相关 EMC 由 ZICTA 处理。电机驱动工具、电子调速器、充电器和电源不得产生过量电磁骚扰，并应具备足够抗扰度，依适用的 ZS/IEC/CISPR 参考举证。
summary.zht: 尚比亞不像歐盟那樣設有單一專門的 EMC 指令；EMC 要求透過採用相關 IEC/CISPR 發射與抗擾參考的 ZS 標準體現，並在 ZABS 合格評定中適用，帶無線功能產品的無線電相關 EMC 由 ZICTA 處理。電機驅動工具、電子調速器、充電器和電源不得產生過量電磁騷擾，並應具備足夠抗擾度，依適用的 ZS/IEC/CISPR 參考舉證。

standards_or_laws: ZS standards adopting relevant IEC/CISPR EMC emission and immunity references, applied through ZABS conformity assessment
ZICTA type approval for radio-related EMC of products with wireless functions

summary.en: China compliance packages may include EMC reports against GB EMC standards alongside GB/T 3883 safety reports. Test limits, configuration, worst-case operating modes, charger inclusion, and declaration wording still need re-mapping to the ZS/IEC/CISPR references applied by ZABS, and any wireless function needs separate ZICTA evidence.
summary.zh: 中国合规包可能在 GB/T 3883 安全报告之外包含针对 GB EMC 标准的 EMC 报告。测试限值、配置、最不利工况、是否包含充电器以及声明措辞仍需重新映射到 ZABS 适用的 ZS/IEC/CISPR 参考，任何无线功能需单独的 ZICTA 证据。
summary.zht: 中國合規包可能在 GB/T 3883 安全報告之外包含針對 GB EMC 標準的 EMC 報告。測試限值、配置、最不利工況、是否包含充電器以及聲明措辭仍需重新映射到 ZABS 適用的 ZS/IEC/CISPR 參考，任何無線功能需單獨的 ZICTA 證據。

standards_or_laws: China GB EMC standards and test reports where applicable

gap.en: A frequent gap is a report that tests only the bare tool but omits the charger, battery pack, electronic controller variants, or worst-case load conditions, and assumes a China GB EMC report transfers directly. The Zambian file should show the exact marketed configuration, map results to the ZS/IEC/CISPR references applied by ZABS, and route any wireless function through ZICTA.
gap.zh: 常见差距是报告只测试裸工具，而遗漏充电器、电池包、电子控制器变体或最不利负载条件，并假定中国 GB EMC 报告可直接转用。赞比亚文件应显示实际销售配置，将结果映射到 ZABS 适用的 ZS/IEC/CISPR 参考，并将任何无线功能经 ZICTA 处理。
gap.zht: 常見差距是報告只測試裸工具，而遺漏充電器、電池包、電子控制器變體或最不利負載條件，並假定中國 GB EMC 報告可直接轉用。尚比亞文件應顯示實際銷售配置，將結果映射到 ZABS 適用的 ZS/IEC/CISPR 參考，並將任何無線功能經 ZICTA 處理。

target.en: Applied through ZABS conformity assessment using ZS standards that adopt IEC/CISPR EMC references; there is no separate stand-alone EMC directive equivalent to the EU EMC Directive. Radio-related EMC for wireless products is mandatory through ZICTA type approval.
target.zh: 通过 ZABS 合格评定使用采用 IEC/CISPR EMC 参考的 ZS 标准适用；不存在等同欧盟 EMC 指令的单独独立 EMC 指令。无线产品的无线电相关 EMC 须经 ZICTA 型号核准，属强制要求。
target.zht: 透過 ZABS 合格評定使用採用 IEC/CISPR EMC 參考的 ZS 標準適用；不存在等同歐盟 EMC 指令的單獨獨立 EMC 指令。無線產品的無線電相關 EMC 須經 ZICTA 型號核准，屬強制要求。

cn.en: China domestic files may include EMC evidence against GB standards, but Zambian acceptance depends on scope, limits, configuration, and mapping to the ZS/IEC/CISPR references applied by ZABS.
cn.zh: 中国境内文件可包含针对 GB 标准的 EMC 证据，但赞比亚接受性取决于范围、限值、配置及对 ZABS 适用的 ZS/IEC/CISPR 参考的映射。
cn.zht: 中國境內文件可包含針對 GB 標準的 EMC 證據，但尚比亞接受性取決於範圍、限值、配置及對 ZABS 適用的 ZS/IEC/CISPR 參考的映射。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Zambia-ready until EMC evidence covers the actual marketed tool system, is mapped to the ZS/IEC/CISPR references applied through ZABS conformity assessment, and any wireless function is cleared through ZICTA. A China GB EMC report does not transfer automatically.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在 EMC 证据覆盖实际销售的工具系统、映射到 ZABS 合格评定适用的 ZS/IEC/CISPR 参考，且任何无线功能经 ZICTA 核准之前，不能视为赞比亚就绪。中国 GB EMC 报告不会自动转用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在 EMC 證據覆蓋實際銷售的工具系統、映射到 ZABS 合格評定適用的 ZS/IEC/CISPR 參考，且任何無線功能經 ZICTA 核准之前，不能視為尚比亞就緒。中國 GB EMC 報告不會自動轉用。
